headline: This MarketAxess Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 4 Downgrades For Thursday
summary: Wall Street analysts changed outlook on top names like MKTX, PRCT, VOD, and JILL. See ratings page and analysts' views before buying MKTX stock.

headline: Rothschild & Co Downgrades MarketAxess Holdings to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $134
summary: Rothschild & Co  analyst Simon Clinch   downgrades MarketAxess Holdings (NASDAQ:MKTX) from Buy to Neutral and lowers the price target from $189 to $134.
